title: cpvp texture pack
description: This texture pack is designed specifically for Crystal PvP (CPvP), focusing on improved visibility and clean combat visuals. The End Crystal has a simplified and high-contrast purple design, making it easier to see and place quickly during fast CPvP fights
body:
discord:danilo677_

A high-quality custom Minecraft skybox designed for use with Skyboxify, allowing OptiFine-style skies to work in modern Fabric versions. View Skyboxify Mod

The skybox features a clean and visually striking environment with a smooth gradient sky transitioning between deep purple and soft pink tones. The atmosphere feels calm yet vibrant, with a strong aesthetic inspired by competitive PvP texture packs.

The image showcases a stylized sky filled with soft glowing clouds and subtle light effects. Colors are slightly saturated, giving the sky a dreamy and modern look while still maintaining clarity and visibility during gameplay. The lighting is smooth, with gentle highlights and shadows that add depth without making the scene too busy.

The overall composition is minimalistic and optimized for Crystal PvP, ensuring that the sky does not distract from combat while still enhancing the visual experience. The design is clean, polished, and consistent across all directions, suitable for a seamless 360-degree skybox.

This skybox is designed to be split into a 6-sided cube map (top, bottom, left, right, front, back), ensuring full compatibility with Skyboxify, which supports custom sky textures inside resource packs and allows multiple layered sky effects.
____________________________________________________________________________________________ this texture pack is made for Crystal PvP (CPvP) players who want clean visuals and better combat visibility. The pack focuses on improving important PvP items like End Crystals, Respawn Anchors, and Armor, making them easier to see and use during fast fights.

The End Crystal has a bright and clear purple design so it stands out during crystal placement and breaking. The Respawn Anchor texture is darker and more defined, helping players quickly recognize it during anchor PvP.

The Armor textures are clean and slightly stylized, allowing players to easily identify gear without cluttering the screen. Everything is designed to keep the game looking simple while improving awareness in competitive PvP.

This pack is perfect for players who enjoy fast-paced CPvP and want a texture pack that improves both visibility and gameplay performance.

Features

Clean End Crystal texture for better visibility

Clear Respawn Anchor design

Simplified Armor textures

Optimized for Crystal PvP (CPvP)

Minimalistic and PvP-friendly visuals
